dialog.message: I appreciate your understanding, and while I can't accommodate your request for 30 days, I can offer you a surgery date in 180 days with our mid-career surgeon, under supervision, ensuring quality care while prioritizing your needs. Let me know if that works for you!

dialog.speaker: buyer
